overrides.expect: \mathbf {r} = \begin{array}{c} \left[ \begin{array}{c} r _ {1} \\ r _ {2} \end{array} \right] \\ \vdots \\ \left[ \begin{array}{c} r _ {N} \end{array} \right] \end{array} = \begin{array}{c c c c c c c c} \left[ \begin{array}{c} h _ {1 1} \\ h _ {2 1} \end{array} \right. & h _ {1 2} & \dots & h _ {1 M} \\ \vdots & h _ {2 2} & \dots & h _ {2 M} \end{array} & \left[ \begin{array}{c} s _ {1} \\ s _ {2} \end{array} \right] & \left[ \begin{array}{c} n _ {1} \\ n _ {2} \end{array} \right] \\ \left[ \begin{array}{c} h _ {N 1} \\ h _ {N 2} \end{array} \right. & \dots & h _ {N M} \end{array} + \begin{array}{c} \vdots \\ \vdots \\ \left[ \begin{array}{c} s _ {M} \end{array} \right] \end{array} + \begin{array}{c} \vdots \\ \left[ \begin{array}{c} n _ {M} \end{array} \right] \end{array} \tag {16.6}
overrides.new: \mathbf{r}=\begin{array}{c}\left[\begin{array}{c}r_{1}\\ r_{2}\end{array}\right]\\ \vdots\\ \left[\begin{array}{c}r_{N}\end{array}\right]\end{array}=\begin{array}{ccc}\begin{array}{cccc}\left[\begin{array}{c}h_{11}\\ h_{21}\end{array}\right.& h_{12}& \dots& h_{1M}\\ \vdots& h_{22}& \dots& h_{2M}\\ \left[\begin{array}{c}h_{N1}\\ h_{N2}\end{array}\right.& \dots& h_{NM}\end{array}& \begin{array}{c}\left[\begin{array}{c}s_{1}\\ s_{2}\end{array}\right]\\ \vdots\\ \left[\begin{array}{c}s_{M}\end{array}\right]\end{array}& \begin{array}{c}\left[\begin{array}{c}n_{1}\\ n_{2}\end{array}\right]\\ \vdots\\ \left[\begin{array}{c}n_{M}\end{array}\right]\end{array}\end{array}\tag{16.6}
